feed.title: App Store Discounts（PT）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:206976450490868736+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:206907475259680768+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 2010 201 1809 92
PT 1725 144 1581 18

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(PT)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Rush Rally Origins
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：5,99 € → 1,99 € [1,99 € ~ 5,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：1,99 €

Compras integradas

  • Conteúdos Pacote 1：2,99 €
  • Rallycross Circuits：2,99 €

Application Description

CORRIDAS DE RALLY REALISTAS NA PERSPETIVA VERTICAL! Rush Rally Origins combina as corridas clássicas na perspetiva vertical do original Rush Rally com os gráficos e a física fortemente elogiados de Rush Rally 3. Corre em 36 etapas novas e únicas em todo o mundo, onde a hora do dia e as condições meteorológicas são variantes importantes. Mostra os teus dotes ao volante em diferentes tipos de piso, incluindo neve, gravilha, terra, lama e asfalto! SENTE A ADRENALINA Corre a 60 fps (120 fps nos dispositivos compatíveis) com um dos melhores modelos de dinâmica de carros até à data, especialmente afinado para o Rush Rally Origins para proporcionar uma experiência de corrida mais divertida na perspetiva vertical. Sente a aderência à estrada a mudar consoante o piso e as condições atmosféricas. CAMPEONATOS DE RALLY Compete numa série de campeonatos de rally, corre contra outros no original modo A-B Race ou mantém o sangue frio e a concentração para melhorares os teus tempos no modo de jogo de contrarrelógio. CHEGA AO TOPO Bate os recordes das etapas para subires ao topo das tabelas classificativas online do mundo inteiro. Transfere fantasmas em 4 diferentes classes de carros para comparares as tuas trajetórias de corrida com as dos melhores do mundo. APERFEIÇOA OS TEUS CARROS Desbloqueia e melhora uma seleção de carros Rush Rally clássicos. Usa o nosso sistema simples de melhorias para afinares cada carro de acordo com o teu próprio estilo de condução. CONTROLOS OTIMIZADOS! Um sistema de controlo concebido para ser compatível com ecrãs táteis e comandos de jogo torna a condução ainda mais divertida e consistente. Até podes aumentar a escala e mudar e trocar botões de acordo com as tuas necessidades.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Living Earth - Clock & Weather
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：6,99 € → 3,99 € [3,99 € ~ 6,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：3,99 €

Application Description

Um aplicativo de relógio e clima como você nunca viu. Living Earth apresenta uma deslumbrante simulação ao vivo em 3D do nosso planeta com clima, previsões e relógio mundial para cidades do mundo todo. Veja formações de nuvens, furacões e tempestades tropicais no mundo todo. Explore e experimente uma incrível dinâmica climática no nosso planeta com mapas climáticos em tempo real e monitoramento de ciclones tropicais. Observe nosso planeta flutuando em um universo de milhares de estrelas renderizadas com precisão e ganhe uma perspectiva totalmente nova do tempo e do clima. "Em um mar de aplicativos complicados e ambiciosos, Living Earth é lindamente simples." - New York Times "Um belíssimo aplicativo que mostra a Terra em tempo real, usando dados climáticos mundiais. " - 'Aplicativos Obrigatórios' da WIRED Insider APLICATIVO UNIVERSAL Uma única compra para todos os dispositivos - iPhone e iPad RECURSOS ● Posição real de nuvens de dados quase em tempo real de satélites - atualizados a cada 3 horas. Veja formações de nuvens, furacões e tempestades tropicais no mundo todo. ● Mapas climáticos ao vivo de temperatura, umidade, vento e previsões. ● Relógio mundial, clima e previsão estendida para milhões de cidades do mundo todo com previsões de 10 dias e 2 horas. ● Notificações de ciclones tropicais. Receba notificações de novos ciclones tropicais e atualizações dos sistemas de aviso de tempestades. ● O widget Hoje oferece acesso rápido ao que é essencial sobre o clima, horários de nascer e pôr do sol, relógio mundial e ciclones tropicais ativos. ● Estrelas, constelações e a Via Láctea são todos exibidos com precisão no tempo e espaço. ● Horários do nascer e pôr do sol. ● Observe a mudança das estações no decorrer do ano. Veja a neve e o gelo e outras mudanças sazonais no planeta. ● Alarme com playlist de músicas. Acorde com uma vista espetacular do planeta tocando sua música preferida! ● Sincronização de cidade pelo iCloud com o aplicativo Living Earth para Mac. ENVIE-NOS UM EMAIL: support@radiantlabs.io SIGA-NOS: x.com/livingearthapp

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Card.Note -文艺版PhotoColors和照片拼图
entry.content:
Discount Information

Compras integradas

  • Card.Note Premiun：2,99 € → 1,99 € [0,99 € ~ 2,99 €]

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Compras integradas

  • Card.Note Premiun：1,99 €

Application Description

Card.Note：小某书数万博主私藏推荐的手账类App 这是一款集照片、文字、语音于一体的全能笔记App ，让您以更自由的方式记录生活。 你可以用它来写诗、短文、随想； 也可以使用它的丰富照片模式，记录生活瞬间； 也可以用它来记要事、记清单、记规划、设置要事提醒； 还可以直接用语音输入来记录每个瞬间的念头。 「Card.Note」三大笔记类型： 1、照片笔记 - 拥有单幅、六幅、九幅、自由模式 - 支持自定义布局，设计杂志感版式 - 琉璃色盘模式，支持液态玻璃效果 - 智能配色、配文，让照片讲述故事 - 支持自定义配色、配文，更加随心 2、文字笔记 - 简洁优雅的文字编辑界面 - 支持更换100余种背景色 - 支持更换10余种文青字体 - 支持根据色卡集归档笔记 - 支持添加题图让笔记更丰富 - 每份笔记均可生成精致卡片 3、语音笔记 - 一键录制，解放双手 - 支持语音转化成文本 - 支持暂停/继续播放 - 随时记录灵感、会议和故事 「Card.Note」几大特点： 1.极简设计 循着极简的设计理念，结合图标及手势操作，轻松上手。 2.文青定制 精选了 10 款文青字体及 9 种文青主题色卡、多达 100 种不同颜色的色卡，可根据喜好定制各种卡片。 3.丰富照片样式 支持单幅照片、六幅照片、九幅照片、琉璃色盘等照片模式，可智能识别配色和配文，也可自定义配色、配文及字体样式。 3.全局卡片化 充分融入了卡片设计理念，可根据喜好随意切换横版或竖版两种卡片笔记显示样式。 4.语音录入 可直接语音输入，随时记录每个灵光显现的想法。你可以把它当作成iOS文艺版“闪念胶囊”。 5.要事提醒 可设置提醒闹种，重要事情和计划不再错失。 6.小组件功能 支持Widget小组件功能，可直接在应用图标或Widget快速打开应用或直接进入创建笔记界面，让你随时高效地记录每个念头。 7.iCloud云同步 支持iCloud云同步，多台设备间数据可任意同步。 8.深色模式 全局适配深色模式，视觉舒适不刺眼。 Card.Note 将实用性与美学完美结合。无论是简单的待办清单、长篇的生活随笔、珍贵的语音记录，还是精彩的照片故事，都能在这里找到最适合的呈现方式。 感谢下载，生活愉快。 如有问题或建议，请联系开发者 小红书/微博：土味文艺开发者 邮箱：yande18@126.com

Application Screenshot

iPad

entry.title: Fishow - Cast Anywhere Anytime
entry.content:
Discount Information

Compras integradas

  • Apex Lure Pack (× 99)：7,99 € → 3,99 € [3,99 € ~ 7,99 €]

All Price Information

Price：1,99 €

Compras integradas

  • Fishow Species Collection：7,99 €
  • Cute and Goofy：0,99 €
  • Rainbow Fantasy：0,99 €
  • African Oddities：0,99 €
  • Polar Giants：0,99 €
  • Primeval Hunters：0,99 €
  • Bizarre Creatures：0,99 €
  • Apex Lure Pack (× 99)：3,99 €
  • Apex Lure Pack (× 9)：0,99 €
  • Living Fossils：0,99 €

Application Description

No Learning Curve, No Complicated Steps — Just Open and Start Fishing If you have an AppleWatch nearby, just flip your wrist for new catches. Whether you're commuting, on lunch break, or waiting for something, you can fish anytime, anywhere. No equipment needed—enjoy the fishing experience wherever you are. Over 10 Different Fishing Environments and Rich Biodiversity Real, detailed species data combined with carefully crafted environments and climate strategies ensure a unique experience with every cast. Expertly Designed AI for Each Fish Every fish has its own personality and behavior. Real-time motion data, combined with deep physics simulations, offer an incredibly smooth and responsive experience. Stunningly Illustrated Species Encyclopedia From one-star to nine-star, every fish is crafted with care, making each cast worth the effort. Rich, in-depth creature profiles—collect them and craft your very own aquatic encyclopedia. "Fishow" lets you relax and enjoy the joy of fishing and the satisfaction of collecting, every moment. For support, contact: scofieldchen1879@gmail.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Photo Eraser for iPhone
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：1,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 1,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Application Description

On Sale. Original $ 4.99. Photo Eraser magically remove unwanted objects from photos for iPhone and instantly fix your photos. Powered by the latest revolutionary photo InPaint algorithm, Photo Eraser performs the best among all other iPhone erasers that ruin your photos, including popular professional photo processing softwares. A variety of experiments shows the intelligent Photo Eraser will give you better and more natural, amazing results than any similar tools. Photo Eraser quickly remove unwanted objects from photos for iPhone, including logo, text, data stamp, watermark, acnes, people... without any specialist knowledge and instantly fix the photos automatically as if they were never there. InPaint, improve and repair your photos. It targets to be a simple yet effective photo healing app for all iPhone users. Get the magical photos done in seconds-to-minutes instead of minutes-to-hours. People all over the world use Photo Eraser for iPhone every day to beautify their photos. Free download Eraser for iPhone today to be more creativity! Easy to get use & started. You only need mark unwanted area by red color, Photo Eraser for iPhone will make your photo much better in a minute.    Photo Eraser for iPhone features highlights:   √ Remove watermarks, date stamps and much more unwanted objects from photos for iPhone.  √ Delete unwanted people from photo for iPhone.   √ Erase text, signatures and other undated objects from photos for iPhone.   √ Make skin imperfections vanish for iPhone.   √ Completely non-technical. √ Support all iPhone device: iPhone 6s+, iPhone 6s, iPhone 6+, iPhone6, iPhone 5s, iPhone5c, iPhones 5, iPhones 4s, iPhone4, iPhone 3gs… • Reviews by our users: - Works pretty well! by rfgf1 It does a fairly thorough job of removing things from the backgrounds of pictures, or objects that are not in the main focus of the original. Using the lasso and only straight lines and drawing a box around the object to be removed, is where I have seen my best results. - Amazing by Twon from VA Works great! I'm using a iPhone 6, IOS 8 Feedback:  Any suggestion will be appreciated, support email: market@effectmatrix.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Wipr 2
entry.content:
Discount Information

Compras integradas

  • Filtr：29,99 € → 5,99 € [5,99 € ~ 29,99 €]

All Price Information

Price：5,99 €

Compras integradas

  • Filtr：5,99 €
  • Yearly Recurring Tip：9,99 €
  • Monthly Recurring Tip：1,99 €
  • Mega Tip：22,99 €
  • Tip：5,99 €

Application Description

Wipr blocks ads, popups, trackers, cookie warnings, and other nasty things that make the web slow and ugly. Websites in Safari will look clean, load fast, and stop invisibly tracking you. You’ll notice significant improvements to your battery life and data usage. Setup is a snap. The Filtr add-on extends Wipr’s blocking to all apps on your device. It acts at the network level, but unlike a VPN, it can access none of your data, and can be used in conjunction with VPNs, iCloud Private Relay, and custom DNS. Wipr’s blocklist is updated twice a week automatically, and has enhanced versions for the following languages: Bosnian, Chinese, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Icelandic, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Macedonian, Malay, Montenegrin, Norwegian, Polish, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Spanish, Thai, and Vietnamese. Wipr is a universal app: install it on all your devices (iPhone, iPad, Mac, Vision Pro) with a single purchase. It’s fully accessible with VoiceOver, Voice Control, and more. Dark, Tinted, and Clear icon variants are included. Family Sharing is supported. Because it’s developed by a single independent developer and 100% funded by its users, Wipr only answers to you: no one can pay to have their ads unblocked, and there are no “acceptable ads”. This app was made with love and patience. I hope you’ll enjoy using it as much as I enjoyed designing and building it. – Kaylee Terms & Conditions: https://kaylees.site/terms-and-conditions.html EULA: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

entry.title: Artemis Director's Viewfinder
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：34,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 34,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Compras integradas

  • Monthly：2,99 €
  • Annual：19,99 €
  • Core License：34,99 €

Application Description

Artemis offers a comprehensive database of professional motion picture cameras and lenses, with the facility to add any custom camera format. Hear from our users: Roger Deakins ASC, BSC: Cinematographer (Two Academy Awards wins, 16 nominations) Blade Runner 2049, Sicario, James Bond: Skyfall, The Shawshank Redemption - “It’s great having Artemis on my iPhone. Since I always have my phone with me, I always have a viewfinder at hand. Not only convenient but extremely accurate.” Claudio Miranda ASC: Cinematographer Top Gun: Maverick, F1, Life of Pi, Benjamin Button, Oblivion - “I've been using Artemis from the very beginning. I love that it's a shared tool. First between the director and myself. Then once we approve shots, the images from Artemis get shared with the crew.” Kate Dennis DGA: Director The Handmaid’s Tale, Glow, The Serpent Queen - "Artemis has streamlined my communication with cinematographers, VFX supervisors and other Heads of Department. Now we all know that we are talking about the exact same frame!" Linus Sandgren FSF: Cinematographer Saltburn, La La Land, Babylon, Joy, American Hustle - "Artemis is an amazing Swiss army knife style lens kit that has helped me frame up countless shots in any format in an instant.” Matthew Libatique ASC: Cinematographer Maestro, A Star is Born, Black Swan, Requiem for a Dream, The Fountain - "Not only do I frame every shot with Artemis , I use it to record blocking rehearsals and as part of my process when debating lens and format choices as I work with a director and production designer while location scouting.” Nicolas Winding Refn: Director Too Old to Die Young, The Neon Demon, Only God Forgives, Pusher - "Artemis Pro has tapped into the way of the future by taking full advantage of the digital revolution. The app quickly became an essential tool to capturing my vision.” Mandy Walker ASC, ACS: Cinematographer Elvis, Mulan,, Hidden Figures, Truth, Australia - "Both Artemis & Artemis Prime are essential tool when scouting locations, allowing accurate information to pass from the director and DP to the crew" Barry Ackroyd BSC: Cinematographer Jason Bourne, The Big Short, Captain Phillips, Hurt Locker - "Artemis makes me feel smarter than I was without it. It’s the sharpest tool on my iPhone.” Toby Oliver ACS Cinematographer Get Out, M3GAN 2.0, Happy Death Day, Insidious IV, Wolf Creek 2 - "Artemis Pro is so well thought out. You can precisely choose the camera package and lenses you have to hand to obtain exact ideas of shot angles and sizes on the location survey.” Darius Khondji ASC, AFC, ACS: Cinematographer Bardo, Okja, The Lost City of Z, Delicatessen, Se7en - "Artemis is the best cinematic tool of modern times. I started using Artemis in 2010 and have loved it ever since. It is so accurate with up to date lenses, cameras and formats. It is always with us on scouts and during shoots. Artemis allows the director and I to share how we see things with each other and with the rest of the crew.” Robert McLachlan ASC, CSC: Director / Cinematographer Landman, Yellowstone, Game of Thrones, Westworld - “On Game of Thrones we scouted locations months in advance. Artemis allowed me to communicate our needs to the VFX and art departments. It was critical in planning the Dance of Dragons sequence.” Craig Zobel: Director Westworld, American Gods, The Leftovers, The Penguin - “I use Artemis on a daily basis. Both on set where it saves so much time, but also to help plan for a shoot, as accurate photo storyboards have become so useful. I can't imagine filming without it these days. I always have my phone, so I always have a viewfinder.” Artemis also offers: - Virtual Stand-Ins, to assist in blocking actors - Custom Frame-lines - Share camera & lens setups with other Artemis users - Record Images & Videos - Gallery for sorting and planning - Export of Shot-lists & Storyboards - Export of detailed Shot-Plans with sun position data (if paired with the Helios app)

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: 阿福出境管家（原签证大师）
entry.id: 阿福出境管家（原签证大师）-pt-1779423437113
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：0,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 0,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Compras integradas

  • 黄金会员月度：1,99 €
  • 黄金会员月：1,99 €
  • 普通会员买断：24,99 €
  • 黄金会员买断：44,99 €
  • 黄金年会员：34,99 €
  • 黄金月会员：3,99 €
  • 基础月会员：0,99 €
  • 黄金会员：3,99 €
  • 普通：2,99 €

Application Description

阿福出境管家帮助你理清「这次出境前要准备什么」：是否需要签证、如何准备材料、风险与薄弱环节在哪里，以及保险、入境与行前事项等参考信息。 【能力与场景】 • 覆盖 9 个热门出境目的地（含美国、英国、加拿大、申根、澳大利亚、日本、韩国、新西兰、新加坡等，具体以应用内列表为准） • AI 签证风险评估：多步问卷，输出通过/拒签风险相关维度的参考分析（非官方结论） • 工具与攻略：材料清单、申请时间线、多国对比、签证百科类内容；部分目的地含深度报告/付费增值能力（以应用内为准） • 出境准备向模块：围绕 签证、保险、入境、行前清单、落地出行 等方向组织（与关于页一致） 【说明】 本应用非使领馆或政府机构官方应用，评估与建议仅供准备参考；签证是否签发以使领馆最终决定为准。 使用条款：https://usvisatest.com/terms

entry.title: Evoland 2
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：5,99 € → 0,99 € [0,99 € ~ 5,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：0,99 €

Application Description

What were your childhood games like? Onboard on an epic adventure of more than 20 hours through video games history filled with a ton of funny classical games references. From 2D RPG, through 3D vs fight to a shooter, a trading card game and more you’ll get your fill of jumping from a game genre to another, never bored. “Evoland 2: A slight case of spacetime continuum disorder” is not only one game but many, backboned with a story that will make you travel through time, discovering different art styles and video gaming technology. Released first on PC with 500.000 copies shipped, we’re proud to share with you this experience carefully adapted for mobile devices. « It’s a mashup on a grand scale — and a successful one — bringing together many of the elements that make us love all those games individually. » - 9/10 GamesBeat “Evoland 2 manages to seamlessly blend an incredible number of genres into a single, wonderful experience.” 4/5 – Hardcoregamer Compatible with MFI controllers. If you experience any problem with Evoland 2, please contact our customer support at hello@playdigious.com and give us as much as possible information on your problem.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Balatro
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：7,99 € → 5,59 € [5,59 € ~ 9,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：5,59 €

Application Description

Damos-te a boas-vindas ao jogo oficial do Balatro! Altamente viciante e satisfatório, Balatro consiste numa combinação mágica de jogos de cartas como Solitário e Póquer e dá-te a possibilidade de quebrares as regras de uma forma nunca antes vista! O teu objetivo é ultrapassares as Boss Blinds conseguindo mãos fortes de póquer. Encontra novos Jokers que mudam o jogo e criam incríveis e entusiasmantes combinações! Ganha fichas suficientes para ultrapassares os astutos bosses e encontra baralhos e mãos de bónus ocultos enquanto jogas. Serve-te de todo o tipo de ajudas para derrotares o boss principal, ultrapassares o desafio final e venceres o jogo. Características: Cada sessão é diferente: cada item recolhido, cada carta descartada e cada joker podem mudar drasticamente o rumo do jogo. Vários itens de jogo: descobre mais de 150 Jokers, cada um com poderes especiais. Usa-os com baralhos diferentes, mehora cartas e vouchers para conseguires pontuações melhores. Diferentes modos de jogo: Desfruta do modo de campanha e do modo de desafio. Espetacular arte pixelizada: Regressa à era dos CRTs e desfruta de uma arte pixelizada rica em detalhes e criada de forma manual.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad
